title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Nexus Select Trust

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Nexus Select Trust
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Nexus Select Trust in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nexus Select Trust:
Nexus Select Trust is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Select Trust!
